title: Classic Dyes
description: Classic Dyes restores the old Minecraft dye textures.
body:
# Classic Dyes

Classic Dyes restores the old Minecraft dye textures, bringing back the nostalgic look and feel from earlier versions of the game.

If you miss the classic colors and want your world to feel like older Minecraft updates, this pack is made for you.

## ✨ Features
- Restores all dye item textures to their pre-1.21.9 versions.

- Works on Minecraft 1.21.9 – 1.21.10.

- Fully compatible with other resource packs.

- Lightweight and simple — no performance impact.

### 💡 Notes
To ensure compatibility, this pack includes updated ```pack.mcmeta``` formatting so no warning message appears when loading it.
